title: JWT-encoded off-chain session token for verified handshakes

artifacts.description: Add Section 7: Off-Chain Session Token Profile — JWT claim namespace (iss, sub, scope, nonce, exp, iat, jti, bolyra_root), signing algorithm (ES256), JOSE header extension x-bolyra-registry linking to on-chain registry address, token TTL policy, and revocation model.

Implement encodeSessionToken(handshakeResult, relayerPrivKey, ttl) and verifySessionToken(jwt, relayerPubKey, expectedRegistry) helpers. Uses jose library for ES256 sign/verify. Validates nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, sessionNonce binding.
Re-export encodeSessionToken and verifySessionToken from public API surface.
Unit tests: roundtrip encode/verify, expired token rejection, wrong registry rejection, tampered claim rejection, nonce mismatch rejection, scope commitment integrity check.
Add section: 'Minting and verifying off-chain session tokens' with code snippet showing post-handshake JWT issuance and API gateway verification pattern.

steps: Define claim namespace in spec: map nullifierHash -> sub, scopeCommitment -> scope (base64url), sessionNonce -> nonce, registry contract address -> iss, block-derived expiry -> exp, uuid -> jti for replay prevention
Specify JOSE header: alg=ES256, typ=JWT, x-bolyra-registry=<checksummed registry address>, x-bolyra-chain-id=<EIP-155 chain id>
Define signing key lifecycle: relayer generates secp256k1 key, publishes compressed pubkey to registry via setRelayerKey(), rotates on compromise — spec rotation and grace period
Spec token TTL policy: default 15 minutes, max 1 hour, must not exceed on-chain session expiry; exp MUST be <= handshake block timestamp + maxSessionTTL
Spec revocation model: stateless (rely on short TTL) for MVP; note jti-based blocklist as future extension; document tradeoff explicitly in spec
Implement encodeSessionToken() in sdk/src/sessionToken.ts: accepts HandshakeResult type, relayer ES256 JWK, ttlSeconds; constructs payload; signs with jose SignJWT; returns compact JWT string

Implement verifySessionToken() in sdk/src/sessionToken.ts: accepts compact JWT, relayer public JWK, expected registry address, expected chainId; verifies signature, exp, iss, x-bolyra-registry header; returns typed SessionTokenClaims
Add SessionTokenClaims and RelayerKey types to sdk/src/types.ts
Wire re-exports through sdk/src/index.ts and update sdk/package.json exports map if needed
Write unit tests covering: valid roundtrip, expired token, future iat rejected, wrong iss, wrong x-bolyra-registry, tampered sub, tampered scope, nonce field present and matches
Update sdk/QUICKSTART.md with post-handshake JWT minting example and API gateway verification snippet
Run tsc --noEmit and npm test in sdk/, fix any type errors
Commit with DCO sign-off: 'feat(sdk): add encodeSessionToken / verifySessionToken for off-chain session JWTs'
dependencies: jose npm package (^5.x) for ES256 JWT sign/verify
verifyHandshake() return shape must include nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, sessionNonce, registryAddress
EIP-155 chain ID available at SDK call site (passed in or read from provider)
Relayer key management out of scope for MVP — caller responsible for key material
